138 D0500A1_STF_INTRST_LOSS_CD D0500A1_STF_INTRST_LOSS_CD D0500A1 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Interest Loss Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment whether the resident has experienced a loss of interest or pleasure in doing things. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
139 D0500A2_STF_INTRSTLOSS_FREQ_CD D0500A2_STF_INTRSTLOSS_FREQ_CD D0500A2 Staff
